name: Neo Lithium Corp.
summary: Neo Lithium Corp., a lithium brine exploration company, engages in the exploration and development of resource properties. It explores for lithium deposits. It owns a 100% interest in the Tres Quebradas (3Q) project covering an area of approximately 35,000 hectares, including a salar complex of approximately 16,000 hectares located in Catamarca Province, Argentina. Neo Lithium Corp. was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
